requirement: 6 high-impact upgrades: rich order/trade queries, trading cycles, session extend/shorten, lock/unlock users, market times, firm view

tasks.title: Rich order/trade queries + trading cycles + market times
tasks.description:
Upgrade 3 BASIC features to SUBSTANTIAL.

Part A — Rich order query (modify handlers_order.go handleListOrders):
Add query params: side, order_type, time_in_force, price_min, price_max, quantity_min, quantity_max, date_from, date_to, client_order_id, firm_id.
Parse all from r.URL.Query(), filter in-memory after loading from store (in-memory store loads all, filter in handler). Return paginated results with total count.
Same for trade queries in handlers_trade.go: add instrument_id, participant_id, date_from, date_to, price_min, price_max filters.

Part B — Trading cycles (new types + store + handlers):
APPEND to types.go:
- TradingCycle struct: ID, MarketID, Name, SessionSequence []string (e.g. [PRE_OPEN, CONTINUOUS, CLOSING_AUCTION, CLOSED]), IsDefault bool, CreatedAt — json tags
- Add TradingCycleID string field to Instrument struct

APPEND to store.go:
- TradingCycleStore: Create, Get, ListByMarket, Delete + InMemory
- Seed: 'STANDARD' cycle for MSE with [PRE_OPEN, CONTINUOUS, CLOSING_AUCTION, CLOSED]
- Seed: 'OFF_BOOK' cycle for MSE with [CONTINUOUS, CLOSED]

Create handlers_trading_cycle.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/trading-cycles
- GET /api/v1/securities/trading-cycles?market_id=
- GET /api/v1/securities/trading-cycles/{id}
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/trading-cycles/{id}

Part C — Market times:
Add to Market struct: OpenTime string, CloseTime string, TradingDate string — json tags
Modify handleDayStart: validate current time is within market trading hours (if OpenTime set)
Modify handleDayEnd: set TradingDate to today's date

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Session extend/shorten + lock/unlock + firm view
tasks.description:
Upgrade 3 more features.

Part A — Session extend/shorten:
Add to types.go: SessionExtension struct (InstrumentID, ExtendMinutes int, ShortenMinutes int, NewEndTime string, Reason)
Modify handlers_session.go or create new endpoints:
- POST /api/v1/securities/sessions/{instrument_id}/extend — body: {duration_minutes, reason}
  Store the extension, set a timer (for MVP: just record the extension, no auto-transition)
- POST /api/v1/securities/sessions/{instrument_id}/shorten — body: {duration_minutes, reason}
  Similar — record the shortening

Part B — Lock/unlock users + forced logout:
Add to ExchangeParticipant: LockedAt string, LockReason string fields.
Add to ParticipantStore: Lock(id, reason) error, Unlock(id) error
Add to handlers_participant.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/participants/{id}/lock — set status to LOCKED (new status), preserves orders, set LockReason. Log audit.
- POST /api/v1/securities/participants/{id}/unlock — set status to ACTIVE. Log audit.
- Enhance existing force-logout: add reason field, log audit entry with reason

Part C — Firm view aggregation:
Create handlers_firm_view.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/surveillance/firm-view/{firm_id} — returns:
  {
    firm_id, firm_name,
    orders: {total, pending, filled, cancelled},
    trades: {total, buy_volume, sell_volume, net_volume},
    positions: [{instrument_id, quantity, avg_cost}],
    alerts: {total, open, investigating, resolved},
    recent_orders: [...last 10...],
    recent_trades: [...last 10...]
  }
  Aggregate from orderStore, tradeStore, positionStore, surveillanceStore.

Update server.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for all Sprint 6 features
tasks.description:
Write tests for all 6 upgraded features.

1. Order/trade query tests:
- TestOrderQuery_FilterBySide — side=BUY → only buys
- TestOrderQuery_FilterByPriceRange — price_min=800&price_max=900
- TestOrderQuery_FilterByDateRange
- TestTradeQuery_FilterByInstrument

2. Trading cycle tests:
- TestTradingCycleStore_Create_List
- TestCreateTradingCycle → 201
- TestListByMarket → seeded STANDARD + OFF_BOOK

3. Session extend/shorten:
- TestExtendSession → 200
- TestShortenSession → 200

4. Lock/unlock:
- TestLockParticipant → status LOCKED, orders preserved
- TestUnlockParticipant → status ACTIVE

5. Market times:
- TestMarketWithTimes → OpenTime/CloseTime in response

6. Firm view:
- TestFirmView → aggregated counts correct
- TestFirmView_EmptyFirm → zeros

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
